title: 10 best herbal essential oils for overeating
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for overeating are natural extracts that help regulate appetite and metabolism, promoting a healthy relationship with food. The best herbal essential oils for overeating include Gymnema sylvestre, Ginkgo biloba, Garcinia cambogia, Cassia auriculata, Cinnamomum verum, Zingiber officinale, Silybum marianum, Curcuma longa, Citrus reticulata, and Commiphora mukul. Without these remedies, overeating can lead to weight-related health issues, decreased self-esteem, and strained relationships, ultimately affecting one's overall well-being and quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guduchi essential oils helps with overeating because it has a profound impact on the digestive system. The oil's bioactive compounds work to regulate appetite, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks and treats. Additionally, Guduchi oil soothes the stomach, alleviating bloating and discomfort that often accompanies overindulgence. By promoting healthy digestion and satiety, Guduchi essential oils encourage mindful eating habits and support a balanced diet, helping individuals develop a healthier relationship with food and their bodies.
remedy_properties: Digestive stimulant: Guduchi has been traditionally used to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and flatulence, which can help reduce overeating caused by poor digestion.

Antioxidant properties: Guduchi's antioxidant properties may help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to overeating habits, as chronic inflammation is linked to cravings for unhealthy foods.

Stress-reducing properties: Guduchi has been traditionally used to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers of overeating. By reducing stress levels, Guduchi may help individuals avoid emotional eating.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Guduchi contain bioactive compounds that help regulate appetite and metabolism, making them effective in reducing symptoms of overeating.
Buds: The buds of Guduchi have a high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe digestive discomforts caused by overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh gymnema sylvestre leaves at dawn or before noon when they are most potent.
Dry the leaves in a warm oven set between 80-90°f for 6-8 hours or until brittle.
Mince the dried leaves into small pieces using scissors or a food processor to increase surface area.
Steam distill the minced gymnema sylvestre leaves using a still at 100-150°f for 2-3 hours.
Filter and decant the essential oil from the distillation residue after 30 minutes of settling.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cape jasmine essential oils helps with overeating because it promotes a sense of fullness and satisfaction, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks. The oil's sweet, floral aroma also has a calming effect on the mind and body, which can help alleviate stress and anxiety that often triggers overeating. Additionally, cape jasmine oil's anti-inflammatory properties may aid in digestion and reduce bloating, making it easier to stick to a healthy eating routine.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Gardenia essential oil has been shown to possess strong antioxidant activity, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, both of which can contribute to overeating.

Appetite-suppressing properties: The essential oil has been found to exhibit appetite-suppressing effects in animal studies, likely due to its ability to stimulate the release of certain neurotransmitters that regulate hunger and fullness.
Stress-reducing properties: Gardenia essential oil has a calming and soothing effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce stress and anxiety-related overeating.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of cape jasmine contain flavonoids and saponins that help alleviate digestive issues and reduce symptoms of overeating.
Barks: The barks of the cape jasmine plant are rich in tannins, which aid in digestion and may help mitigate the effects of overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of fresh gardenia jasminoides flowers at dawn when fragrant, avoiding any wilted or damaged blooms.
Steam distill the harvested flowers in 200ml of distilled water for 30 minutes using a small-scale steam distillation apparatus.
Filter the resulting essential oil mixture through a coffee filter paper to separate it from the water and other impurities.
Store the extracted essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid at room temperature, protected from direct sunlight and heat sources.
Allow the essential oil to mature for 7 days before using it as needed, ideally diluted with a carrier oil at a ratio of 2% gardenia jasminoides oil to 98% carrier oil.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder essential oils helps with overeating because it contains compounds that stimulate digestion and reduce bloating. When used in aromatherapy, the scent of elder oil can help to suppress appetite and regulate hunger hormones, making it easier to stick to a healthy diet. Additionally, elder oil's anti-inflammatory properties can soothe digestive issues associated with overindulgence, promoting a sense of fullness and satisfaction without discomfort. This natural approach can support a balanced eating routine and promote overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Elderberry oil has anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which can contribute to overeating and poor digestion.
Antioxidant: Elderberry oil is rich in antioxidants that can help protect the body from free radicals and oxidative stress, which can lead to cravings for unhealthy foods and overconsumption.

Digestive aid: The essential fatty acids and terpenes in elderberry oil can help stimulate digestive enzymes, improve gut motility, and reduce symptoms of bloating and discomfort associated with overeating.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which can help soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of overeating.
Buds: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can aid in reducing inflammation and promoting digestion after overindulgence.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried sambucus nigra flowers and leaves from organic sources.
Dry the plant material for at least 24 hours to reduce moisture content to less than 10%.
Steam distill 100 grams of dried sambucus nigra plant material with 500 milliliters of water for 30 minutes.
Separate the essential oil from the hydrosol using a separating funnel and store it in dark glass bottles.
Dilute the sambucus nigra essential oil to 2% concentration with carrier oils like jojoba or sweet almond oil.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel essential oils helps with overeating because it has a profound impact on digestion. It stimulates the release of digestive enzymes, helping to break down food more efficiently and reducing bloating and discomfort. Additionally, fennel's sweet anise-like scent can help to curb appetite and reduce cravings for unhealthy snacks, making it an effective natural remedy for weight management. By promoting healthy digestion and suppressing hunger pangs, fennel essential oils can help individuals take control of their eating habits and make healthier lifestyle choices.
remedy_properties: Digestive Stimulant: Fennel essential oil helps stimulate digestion, reducing symptoms of indigestion and bloating caused by overeating, by increasing digestive enzymes and improving gut motility.

Carminative: Fennel's carminative properties help to eliminate gas and reduce bloating, which can contribute to feelings of discomfort and fullness after eating too much, making it easier to manage overeating.

Appetite Suppressant: The anise-like aroma of fennel essential oil has been shown to have a calming effect on the appetite, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks and promoting a sense of fullness and satisfaction.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of fennel contain compounds that help reduce bloating and discomfort caused by eating too much, promoting a sense of digestive harmony.
Seeds: Fennel seeds are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that soothe the stomach and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried foeniculum vulgare seeds in bulk quantities from local health food stores or online suppliers.
Combine one cup of harvested foeniculum vulgare seeds with two cups of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil in a clean glass jar.
Place the sealed jar in a warm and dark place for six to eight weeks to allow for steam distillation.
After the distillation period, strain the mixture using cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass container to separate the essential oil from the solids.
Transfer the extracted foeniculum vulgare essential oil to dark glass bottles and store them in a cool and dry place for up to one year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger essential oils helps with overeating because it has natural appetite-suppressing properties that can curb excessive food cravings. The spicy and invigorating scent of ginger oil sends a signal to the brain, indicating fullness and satisfaction, which in turn reduces the desire to eat more. Additionally, ginger's digestive benefits help alleviate symptoms like bloating and indigestion, making it easier to stop overindulging and maintain a healthy appetite.
remedy_properties: Digestive Stimulant: Herbal ginger essential oil helps stimulate digestion, which can aid in reducing bloating and discomfort caused by overeating. This property helps to regulate digestive processes, making it easier to manage excess food consumption.

Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of herbal ginger essential oil help reduce inflammation in the body, which is often linked to overeating and poor eating habits. By combating oxidative stress, this property can contribute to a healthier gut and reduced symptoms associated with excessive eating.

Appetite Suppressant: Herbal ginger essential oil has been shown to have natural appetite-suppressing properties, helping to curb cravings for unhealthy or excess foods. This makes it easier to stick to a balanced diet and maintain a healthy weight.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the ginger plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine to aid digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes, the underground stems of the ginger plant, are rich in compounds that help alleviate bloating and discomfort after eating excessive amounts.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginger root at dawn for optimal potency and aroma retention.
Dry the ginger root in a well-ventilated area at 60°c for 7 days to reduce moisture content.
Steam distill 250g of dried ginger root in 500ml of water at 100°c for 4 hours to extract essential oil.
Filter the resulting mixture through a coffee filter and store the clear essential oil in dark glass bottles at room temperature.
Use 5-7 drops of the essential oil blend with a carrier oil for aromatherapy massage or inhalation therapy three times daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe essential oils helps with overeating because it possesses a unique property that promotes a sense of fullness and satisfaction, thereby reducing cravings for unnecessary snacking. The oil's bioactive compounds work to regulate appetite hormones, suppressing the production of ghrelin while increasing levels of peptide YY, which signals the brain that the stomach is full. Additionally, aloe's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce stress and anxiety, common triggers of overeating, allowing individuals to make healthier food choices and maintain a balanced diet.
remedy_properties: Astringent Properties: Herbal aloe essential oil has astringent properties that can help reduce appetite by drying up excess saliva and reducing cravings for unhealthy snacking.

Digestive Soothing Properties: The essential oil has anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties that can soothe digestive issues, such as bloating and discomfort, which may contribute to overeating.
Emotional Balancing Properties: Aloe vera oil has a calming effect on the mind and body, which can help reduce stress and anxiety triggers that often lead to emotional eating.
remedy_parts: Roots: Aloe roots contain a high concentration of anthraquinones, which help soothe digestive issues caused by overeating and reduce inflammation.
Rhyzomes: Aloe rhyzomes have been traditionally used to treat indigestion and constipation, making them a valuable part for creating essential oils that alleviate symptoms of overeating.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried aloe vera leaves and organic bergamot peels in equal proportions measuring one teaspoon each.
Combine ingredients in a clean glass jar and add 2 tablespoons of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil.
Place the mixture in a slow cooker set to low heat for 8 hours allowing the herbs to infuse into the oil.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter discarding the solids and transferring the oil to a dark glass bottle.
Allow the essential oil to mature for at least 24 hours before using it in aromatherapy blends or applying topically.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lime essential oils helps with overeating because they stimulate the digestive system, promoting a sense of fullness and satisfaction. The citrusy scent of lime oil can also help to reduce cravings for unhealthy snacks by suppressing appetite hormones like ghrelin. Additionally, the uplifting and refreshing aroma of lime oil can improve mental clarity and focus, making it easier to make healthier food choices.
remedy_properties: Digestive aid: Lime essential oil may help alleviate digestive discomfort and bloating associated with overeating due to its ability to ease digestive spasms and reduce inflammation.
Mood booster: The uplifting and refreshing aroma of lime essential oil can help improve mood and reduce stress, which can contribute to emotional eating habits.
Appetite suppressant: Some studies suggest that the scent of citrus oils, including lime, can increase feelings of fullness and satisfaction, potentially reducing food cravings.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the lime plant are rich in antioxidants and have been shown to help reduce inflammation, making them a great addition to essential oils for digestive health.
Buds: Lime tree buds contain compounds that can help regulate appetite and metabolism, making them effective in reducing symptoms of overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of fresh tilia x europaea flowers at dawn and dry them immediately.
Mix 5 grams of dried flowers with 50 milliliters of carrier oil in a glass jar.
Steep the mixture for 14 days at room temperature, shaking the jar daily.
Strain the liquid through cheesecloth into another container, discarding the solids after 1 hour.
Store the essential oil in an amber glass bottle and use within 6 months, applying topically as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm essential oils helps with overeating because they promote a sense of fullness and satisfaction, reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks. The calming properties of lemon balm also help to reduce stress and anxiety that can often trigger overeating. Additionally, the uplifting scent of lemon balm can increase feelings of joy and contentment, making it easier to stick to a healthy diet. By incorporating lemon balm essential oils into your daily routine, you can develop healthier eating habits and a more positive relationship with food.
remedy_properties: Digestive Relief: Lemon balm essential oil has carminative and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate digestive discomfort, bloating, and cramps associated with overeating.

Appetite Suppression: The citrusy scent of lemon balm essential oil can help suppress appetite by reducing cravings for unhealthy snacks and promoting feelings of fullness, making it easier to stick to a healthy diet.

Stress Reduction: Lemon balm essential oil has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce stress and anxiety that often trigger overeating behaviors, leading to healthier food choices and portions.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lemon balm roots contain compounds that help regulate digestion and alleviate symptoms associated with overeating.
Flowers: The flowers of lemon balm have a calming effect on the digestive system, making them useful in treating digestive issues caused by overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the harvested leaves using a clean towel or drying rack for at least 24 hours.
Place 10 grams of dried melissa officinalis leaves into a clean glass jar and add 100 milliliters of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil.
Allow the mixture to steep for 21 days in a cool dark place without disturbing it shaking or filtering.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another clean glass bottle discarding solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass essential oils helps with overeating because it possesses a unique ability to stimulate digestive enzymes, promoting healthy digestion and absorption of nutrients. The citrusy scent also has a natural appetite-suppressing effect, reducing cravings for unhealthy foods. Additionally, lemongrass oil's calming properties can help alleviate stress and anxiety, common triggers for emotional eating. By using lemongrass essential oils, individuals can regain control over their hunger hormones, making it easier to maintain a balanced diet and healthy weight.
remedy_properties: Digestive Stimulant: Lemon grass essential oil has digestive stimulant properties, which can help stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating associated with overeating, allowing for easier digestion and absorption of nutrients.

Carminative: Lemon grass essential oil is a natural carminative, meaning it can help remove gas and reduce discomfort in the digestive tract, alleviating symptoms such as bloating, cramps, and nausea that often follow excessive eating.

Anxiolytic: Lemon grass essential oil has anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) properties, which can help calm the mind and body, reducing stress-related cravings for comfort foods and promoting a sense of fullness and satisfaction, making it easier to stick to healthier eating habits.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of lemongrass contain compounds that help regulate digestive enzymes and reduce symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
Stems: The stems of lemongrass are rich in citral, a natural compound that helps stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh lemongrass leaves and stalks in the early morning for optimal oil quality.
Dry the harvested lemongrass under shade or using a food dehydrator at low temperature.
Steam distill the dried lemongrass in a glass apparatus using 10-15% distilled water ratio.
Collect the resulting essential oil and separate it from the hydrosol by decantation method after 2 hours of distillation.
Filter the collected essential oil through a coffee filter or paper filter to remove any impurities before storing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Coriander essential oils helps with overeating because it has a unique ability to curb appetite and reduce cravings. The oil's sweet, citrusy aroma stimulates the digestive system, promoting feelings of fullness and satisfaction. Additionally, coriander oil's anti-inflammatory properties help to regulate blood sugar levels, making it less likely for individuals to indulge in excess food intake. By inhaling or applying topically, this natural oil can aid in breaking the cycle of overeating, promoting a healthier relationship with food.
remedy_properties: Digestive aid: Coriander oil helps to improve digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and cramps, which can contribute to overeating by reducing discomfort after meals.

Appetite suppressant: The aromatic properties of coriander oil have been shown to decrease appetite and reduce cravings for unhealthy foods, making it easier to manage portion sizes and make healthier choices.
Stress relief: Coriander oil has a calming effect on the body, which can help to alleviate emotional eating triggers such as stress and anxiety, leading to more mindful and controlled eating habits.
remedy_parts: Roots: Coriander roots have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to help reduce symptoms of indigestion and bloating associated with overeating.
Seeds: Coriander seeds contain a compound called linalool, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe digestive issues caused by overindulgence.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh coriandrum sativum leaves in early morning dew for optimal potency and aroma.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm, dark place for at least 7 days to reduce moisture content.
Steam distill the dried leaves using a steam distillation apparatus with 200g of leaves and 500ml of water for 2 hours.
Collect the essential oil that separates from the distilled water and filter it through a coffee filter to remove impurities.
Store the final coriandrum sativum essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid, ready for use within 6 months.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat overeating with herbal essential oils is to use a blend of calming and digestive-focused oils. Start by diffusing Lavender oil to calm the nervous system and reduce stress triggers that often lead to overeating. Then, add Digestive-8 oil blend, which combines Fennel, Ginger, and other herbs to soothe digestion and alleviate discomfort. Apply the blend topically to the abdomen or inhale it through a nasal diffuser for fast relief.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to overeating that are treated with herbal essential oils are digestive issues such as indigestion, bloating, and cramps. Certain essential oils like peppermint, ginger, and fennel can help alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and support healthy digestion. Other essential oils like chamomile and bergamot may also help calm digestive discomforts associated with anxiety or stress-induced eating. These natural remedies can promote a balanced gut and overall well-being.

remedies.remedy_desc: Gymnema sylvestre essential oils helps with overeating because of its unique properties. It contains compounds like gymnemic acid that interact with the taste buds, blocking the sweetness and bitter receptors, reducing the desire to overeat. Additionally, gymnema sylvestre has been found to enhance the secretion of insulin, helping to regulate blood sugar levels. This combination of actions can aid in weight loss and improve metabolic health by reducing overeating and promoting a balanced diet. Its natural properties make it a promising herbal remedy for weight management.
remedy_constituents: Gymnemic acid: Gymnemic acid helps reduce overeating by inhibiting the ability of taste buds to detect sweetness, thereby reducing cravings for sweet and calorie-rich foods.
Silvestrol: Silvestrol has been found to reduce body weight and improve insulin sensitivity, suggesting its potential role in regulating appetite and metabolism.

Gymnoclavine: Gymnoclavine has been reported to have appetite-suppressing properties and may help reduce overeating by regulating the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, which plays a crucial role in appetite control.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Leaves are commonly used to make essential oils for Gymnema sylvestre as they are rich in gymnemic acid, which helps reduce sugar cravings and manage overeating.
Roots: Roots are another part used to make essential oils, as they contain gymnemic acid and other compounds that aid in appetite suppression and weight management.
Seeds: Seeds are sometimes used to make essential oils, which may help in reducing cravings for sweet and fatty foods, ultimately leading to weight loss and management of overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh gymnema sylvestre leaves at the peak of flowering season for maximum potency.
Steam distill the fresh leaves in a 10:1 water to plant ratio for 2 hours.
Collect the distillate and separate the essential oil from the water using a separator.
Filter the essential oil through a 0.2 micron filter to remove impurities and debris.
Bottle the filtered essential oil in dark glass containers with tight-fitting lids immediately.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba essential oils helps with overeating because it enhances blood flow and reduces inflammation in the digestive tract, promoting a healthy gut. The oil's antioxidant properties also aid in reducing oxidative stress and improving nutrient absorption, leading to better digestion and reduced cravings for unhealthy foods. Additionally, ginkgo biloba's ability to improve cognitive function and memory may help individuals make healthier food choices and develop a more balanced relationship with food. This, in turn, can lead to a reduction in overeating.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: They help with overeating by exerting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may contribute to appetite regulation and reduction of food cravings.
Terpenoids (specifically Bilobalide): They help with overeating by potentially acting as a satiety-inducing agent, reducing the desire to overeat and promoting feelings of fullness.
Triterpenoids (specifically Ginkgolides): They help with overeating by possibly inhibiting the activity of certain neurotransmitters that stimulate appetite, leading to reduced food intake.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used to make essential oils for overeating because they have anti-inflammatory properties that can aid in digestion and reduce inflammation in the stomach.
Seeds: They are used to make essential oils for overeating because they contain compounds that can help reduce appetite and improve digestion.
Fruits: They are used to make essential oils for overeating because they contain bioactive compounds that can help regulate metabolism and reduce food cravings.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30 ginkgo biloba leaves from mature trees in early autumn when they are fully ripe.
Clean the leaves thoroughly with cold water to remove dirt and debris gently.
Steam distill the leaves in a ratio of 1 part leaves to 2 parts water for 2 hours.
Separate the essential oil from the water distillate by decantation or filtration slowly.
Store the ginkgo biloba essential oil in a dark glass bottle away from direct sunlight.

remedies.remedy_desc: Garcinia cambogia essential oils helps with overeating because it aids in weight management by suppressing appetite and reducing cravings for unhealthy foods. The oil's active compound, hydroxycitric acid, inhibits citrate lyase, an enzyme that converts carbohydrates into fat. As a result, the body burns stored fat for energy, leading to weight loss. Additionally, Garcinia cambogia essential oils have been known to boost metabolism, increase energy levels, and promote a sense of fullness, making it easier to stick to a healthy diet and avoid overeating.
remedy_constituents: Hydroxycitric acid (HCA): HCA inhibits the enzyme citrate lyase, which plays a key role in converting carbohydrates into fat, thereby reducing fat production in the body and aiding in weight loss.
Flavonoids: Flavonoids have been shown to have appetite-suppressing and fat-burning properties, making them helpful in reducing overeating and promoting weight loss.
Xanthones: Xanthones have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help regulate appetite and reduce food cravings, ultimately aiding in weight management.
remedy_parts: Fruits: The fruits of Garcinia cambogia are commonly used to make essential oils because they contain high levels of hydroxycitric acid (HCA), a compound believed to aid in weight loss and appetite suppression.
Leaves: Garcinia cambogia leaves are used to make essential oils due to their ability to promote digestion and reduce hunger, making them a popular choice for managing overeating.
Seeds: Garcinia cambogia seeds are sometimes used to make essential oils, as they contain HCA and may help reduce appetite and support weight management.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 fresh garcinia cambogia fruits and clean them thoroughly in cold water for about 10 minutes.
Steam distill the fruits for 2-3 hours to extract the essential oil from the garcinia cambogia.
Collect the distilled essential oil and filter it through a coffee filter to remove any impurities.
Store the filtered essential oil in dark glass bottles with a dropper cap and refrigerate it at 4 degrees celsius.
Use the herbal garcinia cambogia essential oil within 6 months or as directed by a healthcare professional.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cassia auriculata essential oils helps with overeating because of its natural ability to regulate appetite and metabolism. The oil's unique properties, including its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, may help to reduce cravings for unhealthy foods and promote feelings of fullness. Additionally, Cassia auriculata has been traditionally used to support digestive health, which can aid in weight management and reduce the likelihood of overeating. This holistic approach may help individuals develop a healthier relationship with food.
remedy_constituents: Quercetin: Acts as an appetite suppressant and helps reduce fat accumulation in the body.
Auriculatin: Exhibits anti-inflammatory properties, which can help regulate appetite and metabolism.
Kaempferol: Helps in reducing fat absorption and inhibits lipogenesis, thus preventing overeating.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used to make essential oils to treat digestive issues due to their carminative properties.
Roots: They are used to make essential oils to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
Flowers: They are used to make essential oils to treat respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs, due to their expectorant properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest the cassia auriculata flowers when they are fully open and in abundance for maximum oil production.
Dry the cassia auriculata flowers in a well-ventilated area for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Steam distill the dried cassia auriculata flowers at 100-150 degrees fahrenheit for 2-3 hours to extract oil.
Separate the cassia auriculata essential oil from the water and impurities through decantation and filtration.
Store the extracted cassia auriculata essential oil in dark glass bottles with airtight caps at room temperature.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cinnamomum verum essential oils helps with overeating because it aids in suppressing appetite and regulating digestion. The oil's warming and stimulating properties can help reduce cravings for sweet or heavy foods, promoting a feeling of fullness and satisfaction. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties may help soothe digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, that can occur after overeating. This natural remedy can be used in aromatherapy to support weight management and overall well-being.
remedy_constituents: Cinnamaldehyde: Acts as an appetite suppressant, helping to reduce cravings and control food intake.
Cinnamyl acetate: Exhibits a thermogenic effect, increasing metabolism and enhancing fat burning, which can aid in weight management.
Linalool: Possesses a mood-enhancing property, helping to reduce stress and anxiety that may lead to overeating.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are commonly used to create essential oils due to their high cineole content, which is known to aid digestion and alleviate symptoms of overeating.
Barks: Cinnamon bark essential oil is often used to help with digestion and reduce bloating associated with overeating, thanks to its warming and antispasmodic properties.

Rhyzomes: Cinnamomum verum's rhyzomes, or underground stems, contain high levels of cinnamaldehyde, which is commonly used to create essential oils that help alleviate symptoms of indigestion and nausea following overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of cinnamomum verum leaves and stems during the early morning to ensure optimal oil content.
Steam distill the harvested material at 100-110°c for 4-6 hours to extract the essential oil.
Separate the essential oil from the distillate using a separatory funnel and collect 15-20ml of the oil.
Filter the essential oil through a 0.2 micron membrane filter to remove any impurities and contaminants.
Store the filtered essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid in a cool dry place.

remedies.remedy_desc: Zingiber officinale essential oils helps with overeating because it contains compounds that aid in digestion and reduce hunger pangs. The active ingredients, such as gingerol and shogaol, have natural anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate nausea and discomfort after eating. By promoting healthy digestion and reducing bloating, Zingiber officinale essential oils can encourage a balanced eating habit and prevent overeating. This, in turn, supports weight management and overall well-being. It also helps in reducing stress and anxiety that often lead to overeating.
remedy_constituents: Gingerols: These compounds have been shown to have appetite-suppressing properties and may help reduce food cravings.
Shogaols: Similar to gingerols, shogaols have been found to have anti-inflammatory and appetite-suppressing effects, which may aid in reducing overeating.
Zingiberene: This sesquiterpene has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help regulate appetite and metabolism, reducing the likelihood of overeating.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are used to make essential oils for overeating because they contain compounds that help in digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion.
Roots: Roots are used to make essential oils for overeating because they possess properties that aid in reducing nausea and vomiting.
Buds: Buds are used to make essential oils for overeating because they contain oils that help in regulating appetite and reducing overeating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh zingiber officinale rhizomes after 6 months of cultivation in a well-drained soil.
Dry the rhizomes in a warm place at 40°c for 5 days to reduce moisture content.
Steam distill the dried zingiber officinale rhizomes at 100°c for 3 hours to extract essential oil.
Collect the essential oil and separate it from water using a separator funnel within 30 minutes.
Filter the collected essential oil through a 0.2 micron filter paper to remove impurities within 10 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum essential oils helps with overeating because it has been traditionally used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation. The oil's anti-oxidant and anti-inflammatory properties may help alleviate symptoms of digestive discomfort, such as bloating and indigestion, which can be triggered by overeating. Additionally, Silybum marianum may help regulate appetite and metabolism, promoting a sense of fullness and satisfaction, making it a potential natural remedy for those struggling with overeating. Its calming effects may also aid in stress-related eating.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These compounds have been shown to help regulate appetite and satiety, reducing the likelihood of overeating by influencing the brain's response to food.
Silymarin: This complex mixture of flavonoids, particularly silibinin, inhibits the breakdown of fats and reduces the absorption of glucose, thereby reducing the risk of overeating.

Terpenoids (specifically, α-pinene and β-pinene): These volatile compounds can help reduce inflammation and improve gut health, potentially leading to a decrease in appetite and a reduction in overeating behaviors.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Used to make essential oils for their potential benefits in treating digestive issues, including inflammation and liver support.
Leaves: Used to make essential oils for their potential benefits in treating digestive issues, including inflammation and antioxidant properties.
Flowers: Used to make essential oils for their potential benefits in treating digestive issues, including inflammation and antioxidant properties.
remedy_recipe: Collect 50g of dried silybum marianum flowers from a trusted source.
Steam distill the dried flowers for 3 hours using a steam distillation apparatus.
Separate the essential oil from the distilled water using a separatory funnel.
Filter the essential oil through a 5 micron filter paper to remove impurities.
Store the final silybum marianum essential oil in a dark glass bottle at 4 degrees celsius.

remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa essential oils helps with overeating because it has appetite-suppressing properties due to the presence of curcumin, a bioactive compound. Curcumin has been shown to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it easier to manage food cravings and overindulgence. Additionally, curcumin has been found to increase feelings of fullness and satisfaction, helping individuals to make healthier food choices and maintain a balanced diet. This can lead to weight management and improved overall well-being.
remedy_constituents: Curcuminoids: These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce cravings for unhealthy foods and promote feelings of fullness, thereby reducing overeating.
Beta-Caryophyllene: This sesquiterpene has been shown to have anxiolytic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate emotional eating and reduce the desire to overeat.
Oleoresin: This compound contains a mixture of terpenes and phenolic compounds, which can help regulate appetite and metabolism, leading to reduced overeating and weight management.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are the most commonly used part for essential oil production, as they contain high concentrations of curcumin, which helps to alleviate digestive issues caused by overeating.
Leaves: Leaves are also used to make essential oils, as they are rich in volatile compounds that aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of overeating, such as bloating and indigestion.
Stems: Stems of Curcuma longa are used to create essential oils that help to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of overeating, due to their high content of bioactive compounds.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of fresh curcuma longa rhizomes and wash them gently with lukewarm water.
Dry the rhizomes in a cool shaded area for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Steam distill the dried rhizomes using 1 kg of water for 3-4 hours to release essential oils.
Collect the essential oil by condensing the distilled steam and separate the oil from water using a separatory funnel.
Filter the essential oil through a 0.2 micron filter paper to remove any impurities and improve quality.

remedies.remedy_desc: Citrus reticulata essential oils helps with overeating because it supports digestive health and reduces stress. The uplifting scent of this oil can help alleviate emotional eating by promoting feelings of calmness and relaxation. Additionally, its citrus properties stimulate digestion and improve metabolism, making it easier to manage food cravings and maintain a balanced appetite. By incorporating Citrus reticulata essential oils into a wellness routine, individuals can break the cycle of overeating and develop a healthier relationship with food.
remedy_constituents: Limonene: It helps reduce appetite and increase satiety by inhibiting the digestion and absorption of fats.
Linalool: It has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can lead to reduced emotional eating and overeating behaviors.
Citral: It has been shown to have anti-obesity effects by reducing fat accumulation and improving lipid metabolism.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers of Citrus reticulata are used for essential oils to help with overeating because they contain compounds that can aid in weight management and improve digestion.
Buds: The buds of the Citrus reticulata are used for essential oils to help with overeating due to their ability to stimulate the digestive system and promote a feeling of fullness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest the citrus reticulata peels from mature fruits at dawn when the oil content is highest.
Clean the peels thoroughly in cold water to remove dirt and contaminants within 10 minutes.
Steam distill the peels in a 1:3 ratio with water at 100 degrees celsius for 4 hours.
Separate the essential oil from the distilled water using a separator or condenser within 2 hours.
Filter the essential oil through a 0.2-micron filter to remove impurities and contaminants immediately.

remedies.remedy_desc: Commiphora mukul essential oils helps with overeating because it supports digestive health and reduces inflammation in the body. The anti-inflammatory properties of Commiphora mukul, also known as guggul, may help alleviate symptoms of overeating, such as bloating and discomfort. Additionally, it is believed to regulate appetite and enhance metabolism, promoting a balanced digestive system and aiding in weight management. This natural remedy may also help to soothe digestive issues and promote a sense of calm and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Guggulsterones: These sterone compounds have been shown to suppress appetite and reduce fat accumulation in the body, making them potentially beneficial in managing overeating.

Commiphoric acid: This phenolic compound has been found to have anti-obesity properties, likely due to its ability to reduce fat accumulation and improve lipid metabolism, which may help regulate overeating.

Guggul: The guggul resin, a key component of Commiphora mukul, contains a mixture of compounds, including guggulsterones, that may help regulate appetite and metabolism, thus reducing the likelihood of overeating.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are used to make essential oils due to their anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues related to overeating.
Roots: Roots are used to make essential oils because they contain compounds that can aid in reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
Barks: Barks are used to make essential oils due to their ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms associated with overeating, such as bloating and indigestion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30-40 kg of commiphora mukul gum resin from mature trees during the winter months.
Steam distillation is used to extract the essential oil from the commiphora mukul gum resin.
Distill the gum resin at a temperature range of 100-120°c for 6-8 hours.
Collect the distilled essential oil and separate it from the water using a separating funnel.
Filter the essential oil through a cotton cloth and store it in dark glass bottles.
